description: Explicit phase-1 iconv codec scope/exclusion ledger with compatibility intent. This keeps user-facing claims bounded to the deterministic in-tree codec engine while remaining stateful and extension-table work remains in progress.

included_codecs.compatibility_intent: Supported for strict+hardened fixtures and host-parity validation in iconv phase-1.

excluded_codec_families.reason: Stateful escape-sequence codec family deferred until deterministic table generation/checksum provenance closure (`bd-13ya`).
excluded_codec_families.compatibility_intent: Remain unsupported in phase-1; `iconv_open` must return EINVAL.

excluded_codec_families.reason: Shift-state machine and table corpus are out of phase-1 minimal scope.

excluded_codec_families.reason: Large mapping table not admitted until deterministic generation+checksum controls land.

support_matrix_mapping.strict_semantics: Phase-1 iconv implementation for UTF, single-byte, KOI8, EUC-JP, SHIFT_JIS/CP932, BIG5, and GB18030 codecs with deterministic errno semantics
support_matrix_mapping.hardened_semantics: Phase-1 iconv breadth including GB18030 with hardened membrane routing; deterministic bounds/error behavior
